title: PowerGems Resource Pack
body:
This is the Normal resource pack for the [PowerGems](https://modrinth.com/plugin/powergems) plugin.

<details>
<summary>Here's how it looks</summary>

![All of the gems in an inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bvcA0kl5/images/627d3f39655f8e510a3366c9e5a9f7f629613fcf.webp)

</details>

### Naming format:

- **Vx** – Pack version. Check the Discord to see which one you need.
- **Minecraft version + V (optional)** – Used for packs that can load without additional mods. Format: *minimum Minecraft version* + **V** (example: `1.21.4V`).

If the **V** tag is not included, the pack requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) to function.

## FAQ

### Q: What do I need to use this?
A: You need the [PowerGems](https://modrinth.com/plugin/powergems) plugin and it's dependency, along with CIT Resewn if your pack does not have the V tag.

### Q: I'm using a version higher than the minimium minecraft version for a V-tagged pack, will it work?
A: Most likely! If you have any problems, be sure to ask for help in the [Discord](https://discord.iseal.dev/)

### Q: I want to make another pack based on this! Can I?
A: The pack is licenced as ARR (all rights reserved), meaning you cannot do anything with it. **But**, special licences are given in some cases, so reach out to me (iseal) on discord and we can sort something out.

### Q: I want to try the other resource packs! Where can I find them?
A: Just look at this [collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/wGK8f7HI)!
